holdings.infoBox: WCMI is an equity ETF with a total of 54 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 7.11%, Kioxia Holdings at 6.07%, Rolls-Royce Holdings at 5.85%, Nebius Group at 5.18%, and Babcock International Group at 3.74%.

overview.description: The First Trust WCM International Equity ETF (WCMI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively manages a portfolio of international equity securities of industry leading companies with positive fundamentals. The fund will hold stock or depositary receipts to obtain exposure and pursue long-term growth. WCMI was launched on Mar 31, 2020 and is issued by First Trust.
